scripts.build:bonita: node scripts/update-version.js && vite build --mode bonita && node scripts/stamp-build-target.js bonita
scripts.build:rss: node scripts/update-version.js && vite build --mode rss && node scripts/stamp-build-target.js rss
scripts.build: node -e "console.error('Use yarn build:bonita or yarn build:rss to target a project explicitly'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.functionsrss: yarn rss && node scripts/verify-deploy-target.js saas && cross-env DEPLOY_TARGET=saas firebase deploy --only functions -P rss --account=fritz@retailsoftsystems.com
scripts.functionswarp: yarn warp && node scripts/verify-deploy-target.js bonita && cross-env DEPLOY_TARGET=bonita firebase deploy --only functions -P default --account=fritz@bonitabikes.com
scripts.auth: node -e "console.error('Use yarn auth:warp or yarn auth:rss to reauth a specific account'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.host:bonita: yarn warp && yarn build:bonita && firebase deploy --only hosting:app --account=fritz@bonitabikes.com
scripts.host:rss: yarn rss && yarn build:rss && firebase deploy --only hosting:app --account=fritz@retailsoftsystems.com
scripts.host:dashboard: yarn rss && yarn --cwd dashboard build && firebase deploy --only hosting:dashboard --project=cadence-pos --account=fritz@retailsoftsystems.com
scripts.host: node -e "console.error('Use yarn host:bonita, yarn host:rss, or yarn host:dashboard to deploy explicitly'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.hostwarp: yarn warp && yarn build:bonita && firebase deploy --only hosting:app --account=fritz@bonitabikes.com
scripts.hostrss: yarn rss && yarn build:rss && firebase deploy --only hosting:app --account=fritz@retailsoftsystems.com
scripts.hostonlywarp: node scripts/verify-build-target.js bonita && yarn warp && firebase deploy --only hosting:app --account=fritz@bonitabikes.com
scripts.hostonlyrss: node scripts/verify-build-target.js rss && yarn rss && firebase deploy --only hosting:app --account=fritz@retailsoftsystems.com
